prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: symbolic mid-depth memory cutout for scene 5 of a 16:9 Chinese paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style sample and defines paper fibers, ink restraint and palette
Primary request: three overlapping blank torn-paper pages and two abstract flowing ink-line arcs, arranged from upper-right toward center-left as a quiet memory of unfinished study
Style/medium: handcrafted ivory and pale-ochre mulberry paper with deckled edges, minimal charcoal ink curves
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background
Constraints: pages must be completely blank; uniform key background; no people, legible symbols, text, watermark, logo; no #ff00ff in artwork; complete crisp cutout
Avoid: readable calligraphy, magic glow, photoreal paper, decorative clutter
